name: Rowlet
description: A Grass/Flying starter Pokemon. This round owl can rotate its head 180 degrees and attack without making a sound.

name: Dartrix
description: The evolved form of Rowlet. This narcissistic blade quill Pokemon is extremely fussy about its appearance and spends much time grooming.

name: Decidueye
description: The final evolution of Rowlet. A Grass/Ghost archer Pokemon that fires arrow quills from its wings with astonishing precision.

name: Litten
description: A Fire-type starter Pokemon. It grooms itself by licking its fur, then spits the collected fur as flaming hairballs.

name: Torracat
description: The evolved form of Litten. The bell-like organ on its neck produces flames when it spits fire. Its mane senses the emotions of others.

name: Incineroar
description: The final evolution of Litten. A Fire/Dark heel wrestler Pokemon that thrives on the crowd's attention and fights dirty in battle.

name: Popplio
description: A Water-type starter Pokemon. It creates balloons of water from its nose, using them to perform acrobatic battle strategies.

name: Brionne
description: The evolved form of Popplio. A pop star sea lion that dances with water balloons it creates, dazzling opponents before striking.

name: Primarina
description: The final evolution of Popplio. A Water/Fairy soloist Pokemon that controls water balloons with its singing voice to devastating effect.

name: Pikipek
description: A Normal/Flying woodpecker Pokemon. It pecks at trees 16 times per second and stores berries in its beak hole.

name: Yungoos
description: A Normal-type mongoose Pokemon imported to Alola to deal with the Rattata problem. It patrols during the day and sleeps at dusk.

name: Grubbin

evolution.condition: Level up at Vast Poni Canyon

description: A Bug-type larva Pokemon. Its strong jaws let it scrape tree bark and chew through thick wood. It loves electricity.

name: Caterpie
description: A Bug-type caterpillar Pokemon. It releases a terrible stench from the antenna on its head to repel enemies.

name: Pichu
description: A baby Electric-type Pokemon. It is unskilled at storing electricity and may discharge if amused, startled, or tickled.

name: Abra

locations.notes: Will Teleport on first turn - use Quick Ball or status move

description: A Psychic-type Pokemon. It sleeps 18 hours a day but can sense danger through telepathy and Teleport to safety.

name: Wingull
description: A Water/Flying seagull Pokemon. It rides updrafts with its long wings and dives down to snatch food from the sea.

name: Magnemite

evolution.condition: Level up at Vast Poni Canyon

description: An Electric/Steel Pokemon. The units at its sides generate antigravity energy to keep it afloat. It feeds on electricity.

name: Zubat
description: A Poison/Flying bat Pokemon that navigates using ultrasonic waves. It avoids sunlight and lives in caves and dark places.

name: Geodude (Alolan)
description: The Alolan form of Geodude. Rock/Electric type due to Alola's magnetic minerals. It can be found with eyebrows made of iron sand.

name: Meowth (Alolan)
description: The Alolan Dark-type Meowth. Pampered by Alolan royalty, it became prideful and vain, developing into a Dark type.

name: Growlithe
description: A loyal Fire-type puppy Pokemon. It has a brave and trustworthy nature and will fearlessly bark at larger opponents.

name: Eevee

evolution.condition: Level up near Moss Rock (Lush Jungle)
Level up near Icy Rock (Mount Lanakila)
High Friendship + knows a Fairy-type move

description: A Normal-type Pokemon with unstable genetic makeup that allows it to evolve into 8 different forms depending on the conditions.

name: Rockruff

evolution.condition: Level 25 at dusk (5:00-5:59 PM, Own Tempo ability only)

description: A Rock-type puppy Pokemon native to Alola. As it grows, it becomes more aggressive and eventually evolves based on the time of day.

name: Mudbray
description: A Ground-type donkey Pokemon. It eats mud and dirt to create a protective mud armor. Its kicks have incredible force.

name: Magikarp
description: A Water-type fish Pokemon famous for being nearly useless in battle. However, it evolves into the fearsome Gyarados at level 20.

name: Tentacool
description: A Water/Poison jellyfish Pokemon commonly found in Alola's oceans. Its tentacles contain potent venom.

name: Rattata (Alolan)
description: The Alolan Dark/Normal Rattata. It became nocturnal to avoid Yungoos predators and is led by an Alolan Raticate boss.

name: Ledyba
description: A Bug/Flying ladybug Pokemon. It is timid and clusters with others when cold. Its spots convey its emotions.

name: Spinarak
description: A Bug/Poison spider Pokemon. It sets a web trap and waits patiently for prey. The pattern on its back frightens enemies.

name: Buneary
description: A Normal-type rabbit Pokemon. It curls its ears when sensing danger. It starts off distrusting its Trainer but warms up with friendship.

name: Spearow
description: A Normal/Flying Pokemon with a terrible temper. It is very territorial and will attack anything that trespasses with its sharp beak.

name: Drowzee
description: A Psychic-type Pokemon that puts enemies to sleep and eats their dreams. If your nose itches while sleeping, a Drowzee may be nearby.

name: Makuhita
description: A Fighting-type Pokemon that trains by slamming into trees. Its body is mostly fat, which absorbs damage from attacks.

name: Smeargle

learnset.notes: Permanently copies the last move used by the opponent

description: A Normal-type painter Pokemon. It uses Sketch to permanently copy any move. Its tail secretes a fluid that changes color based on mood.

name: Diglett (Alolan)
description: The Alolan form of Diglett with metallic whiskers growing from its head. Ground/Steel type adapted to Alola's volcanic soil.

name: Noibat
description: A Flying/Dragon bat Pokemon. Its large ears emit ultrasonic waves that can shatter boulders. It evolves late at level 48.

name: Grimer (Alolan)
description: The Alolan Poison/Dark Grimer. It was created to deal with Alola's garbage problem. Its colorful appearance comes from a chemical diet.

name: Furfrou
description: A Normal-type poodle Pokemon. Its Fur Coat ability halves physical damage. It can be groomed into different trim styles.

name: Crabrawler
description: A Fighting-type boxing crab Pokemon. It hates to lose and always aims for the top. Found near berry piles throughout Alola.

name: Cutiefly
description: A Bug/Fairy bee fly Pokemon. It can detect the aura of flowers and living things. It collects nectar and pollen from flowers.

name: Wishiwashi

locations.notes: Also the Totem Pokemon of Brooklet Hill trial

evolution.condition: Does not evolve (School Form activates at Level 20+ with 25%+ HP)

description: A Water-type fish that transforms into School Form when above level 20 with enough HP. In School Form, its base stats skyrocket to 130/65/130/65.

name: Salandit
description: A Poison/Fire toxic lizard Pokemon. Its Corrosion ability lets it poison any type, even Steel and Poison. Only females evolve into Salazzle.

name: Cubone
description: A Ground-type Pokemon that wears its mother's skull. In Alola, it evolves into Alolan Marowak (Fire/Ghost) at night.

name: Kangaskhan
description: A Normal-type parent Pokemon that carries its baby in its pouch. Its Scrappy ability allows Normal moves to hit Ghost types.

name: Magby
description: A baby Fire-type Pokemon. Its body temperature is around 1100 degrees F. When it breathes, embers dribble from its mouth.

name: Fomantis
description: A Grass-type sickle Pokemon that photosynthesizes. It is nocturnal despite being a plant, and basks during the day to store energy.

name: Morelull
description: A Grass/Fairy mushroom Pokemon. It glows in the dark and drains nutrients from tree roots. Its spores have a sleep-inducing effect.

name: Comfey
description: A Fairy-type lei Pokemon. Its Triage ability gives priority to healing moves. It collects flowers to make a soothing healing lei.

name: Steenee
description: A Grass-type fruit Pokemon and the evolved form of Bounsweet. It repels enemies with lively spinning kicks and a pleasant aroma.

name: Stufful
description: A Normal/Fighting stuffed bear Pokemon. Despite its cute appearance, it possesses extraordinary strength. Its Fluffy ability halves contact damage.

name: Fletchling
description: A Normal/Flying robin Pokemon. Friendly and cheerful, but fiercely territorial. Its hidden Gale Wings gives priority to Flying moves.

name: Mudsdale
description: The evolution of Mudbray. A powerful draft horse Pokemon with incredible strength. Its mud-coated hooves hit like a wrecking ball.

name: Psyduck
description: A Water-type duck Pokemon with psychic powers. It suffers from chronic headaches and unleashes devastating psychic blasts when the pain becomes unbearable.

name: Poliwag
description: A Water-type tadpole Pokemon. The spiral pattern on its belly is actually its internal organs showing through its thin skin.

name: Dewpider
description: A Water/Bug diving bell spider Pokemon. Its Water Bubble ability doubles Water move damage and halves Fire damage taken.

name: Surskit
description: A Bug/Water pond skater Pokemon. It secretes a thick, sweet honey from the tip of its head that attracts prey.

name: Mimikyu

locations.notes: Also the Totem Pokemon of the Ghost trial

description: A Ghost/Fairy Pokemon that hides under a ragged Pikachu cloth. Its Disguise ability blocks the first hit it takes each battle.

name: Turtonator

locations.notes: Ultra Sun only - Drampa in Ultra Moon

description: A Fire/Dragon turtle Pokemon with an explosive shell. Its signature Shell Trap move punishes physical attackers with 150 base power.

name: Drampa

locations.notes: Ultra Moon only - Turtonator in Ultra Sun

description: A Normal/Dragon Pokemon that is gentle with children. Its Berserk ability raises Special Attack when its HP drops below half.

name: Jangmo-o

locations.notes: Also found in the trial area

description: A Dragon-type scaly Pokemon that trains by headbutting. It lives in Vast Poni Canyon and evolves into the powerful pseudo-legendary Kommo-o.

name: Wimpod

locations.notes: Overworld encounter - runs away, must chase it

description: A Bug/Water cowardly Pokemon. Its Wimp Out ability forces it to flee when HP drops below half. It evolves into the powerful Golisopod.

name: Sandygast
description: A Ghost/Ground sandcastle Pokemon. It controls people to build its body and drains their life force. Water Compaction boosts Defense when hit by Water.

name: Vulpix (Alolan)
description: The Alolan Ice-type Vulpix. It adapted to the snowy mountains of Alola and exhales breath cold enough to freeze anything. Ultra Moon exclusive.

name: Mareanie

locations.notes: SOS battle from Corsola - Mareanie will appear as an ally

description: A Poison/Water starfish Pokemon. Its Merciless ability guarantees critical hits against poisoned targets. Found via SOS battles with Corsola.

name: Toxapex
description: The evolution of Mareanie. An incredibly bulky Poison/Water wall with 152 Defense and 142 Sp.Def. Its Regenerator hidden ability restores HP on switch-out.
